commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in Codex plugin `appServer.nativeHookRelay.memoryGuard` config, admission checks, runtime hook-clearing behavior for attempts and side questions, tests, manifest metadata, and docs.

PR surface: Source +389, Tests +136, Docs +38. Total +563 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced defect: source inspection shows guard denial returns the global disabled-hook overlay as the final config patch, and current merge order lets it override earlier hook config. I did not run a live Codex pressure test in this read-only review.
